meta.label: Enterprise Dash Toolbox Template
meta.description: A highly parameterized dynamic Dash dashboard framework for cross-project deployment.

params.name: input_dataset
params.label: Target Dataset
params.description: The dataset that this Dash app will query and visualize.

params.name: target_folder
params.label: Output Managed Folder
params.description: Optional folder where the Dash app can export generated PDFs/CSVs.

params.name: dimension_col
params.label: Categorical Grouping Column
params.description: Column used for breaking down charts (e.g., Country, Product Category).

params.name: metric_cols
params.label: Numerical Aggregation Columns
params.description: Select the continuous variables to run mathematical aggregates over.

params.name: app_notes
params.label: Footer Markdown/Notes
params.defaultValue: Confidential internal report. Data updates dynamically with the pipeline.

params.name: enable_sampling
params.label: Enable In-Memory Data Sampling
params.description: Turn on if the target dataset is too massive to pull comfortably into Dash memory.

params.name: sampling_limit
params.label: Max Rows to Load
params.description: Enforced only when sampling is enabled above.

params.name: dynamic_slots
params.label: Dynamically Generated Filter Options
params.description: Options are calculated at runtime by an isolated Python script inside the plugin resource folder.
